vocab.meaning: một hoạt động theo đuổi mang lại sự hài lòng/mãn nguyện
vocab.example: Volunteering at the animal shelter is a gratifying pursuit that gives me a true sense of purpose outside of work.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn sau một ngày làm việc mệt mỏi/vất vả
vocab.example: Cooking is my favorite way to unwind after a grueling day at the office, as it allows me to focus on something tactile.
I enjoy playing chess because it helps to stimulate my intellect and forces me to think several moves ahead.

vocab.meaning: say mê/chìm đắm hoàn toàn vào điều gì
vocab.example: Whenever I start painting, I become so deeply engrossed in the process that I completely lose track of time.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự phát triển cá nhân
vocab.example: Solo traveling is a hobby that has significantly helped foster my personal growth and self-reliance.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
vocab.example: Finishing a complex woodworking project provides me with a massive sense of accomplishment that I rarely find elsewhere.
Learning a new language is more than just a hobby; it’s a way to broaden my horizons and connect with different cultures.

vocab.meaning: tiếp thêm năng lượng/làm cho hồi sinh
vocab.example: Outdoor photography always helps to reinvigorate my spirit when I feel overwhelmed by the city's fast pace.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng sức sáng tạo của ai đó
vocab.example: Journaling is a simple yet effective way to nurture my creativity and organize my chaotic thoughts.

vocab.meaning: một phương thuốc giải tỏa căng thẳng tuyệt vời
vocab.example: Going for a vigorous swim in the morning is a great stress-buster and sets a positive tone for the rest of my day.
